items.name_en: Grey hand-rubbed texture·
items.name_cn:
Grey hand-rubbed texture·
Satchel 32cm
The most elegant satchel series sac de jour, a timeless classic. Exquisite hand-rubbed cowhide with clear texture and a rich luster, very luxurious!
Includes a middle divider inside, can be removed to use as a clutch; the shoulder strap is adjustable for your preferred length.
The logo is very small, perfectly interpreting the style of understated luxury~
Model: 378299
Size: 32×25.5×15.5cm
(32cm includes a middle divider)

items.name_en: Grey Peekaboo X-tote
items.name_cn:
Grey Peekaboo X-tote
Classic Monogram canvas paired with the classic Peekaboo rotating buckle. The overall look is both premium and retro, especially suitable for a mature style. The bag is very lightweight, making it a great choice for daily work commutes!
1819B98
Size 41x16x30cm

items.name_en: Gucci Jackie 1961 Collection
items.name_cn:
Gucci Jackie 1961 Collection
Jackie Chain Bag
Launching a new long wallet
Featuring an exquisite chain strap design that can be easily converted into a dainty mini bag. The gold-tone push-lock details recall the Jackie bag introduced in 1961. The classic interlocking double-G canvas pattern highlights the distinctive brand heritage.
I can think of countless ways to style it, making you fall in love with the retro look.
Model 652681
Size 19x10x3.5cm
